name: ccpm
description: Claude Code plugin marketplace for lovaizu projects

plugins.name: rn
plugins.description: Goal-driven work sessions: restate a goal as a faithful understanding, decompose it into reviewed tasks, open a draft PR for the plan, and resume across conversations via a git-tracked steering.md.

plugins.name: hposal
plugins.description: Build estimates and client proposals for corporate-site (HP) renewals — a four-phase workflow from requirements to a deliverable proposal, with a human review gate at each phase.
